summary: Iteration 163 - Gallery & Showcase Verification Complete. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94%). Gallery page fully functional with presigned URLs, filters, sort options, preview modal, leaderboard. CRITICAL BUG: Gallery remix flow navigates to Story Video Studio but story_text is NOT prefilled (React Router v7 state handling issue). Mobile responsive carousel works correctly.

minor.issue: Response uses 'quick' instead of 'quick_variations' key - test expectation mismatch

ui_bugs.issue: Story text NOT prefilled in Story Video Studio after remix click. Navigation state exists in history.state.usr but location.state appears null in useLocation() hook. React Router v7 state sync issue.

integration_issues.issue: Navigation with state works (data in history.state.usr.prompt) but React component not reading state correctly

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays content until dismissed

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Gallery remix flow - story_text not being prefilled in Story Video Studio. The navigation state is correctly passed in history.state.usr.prompt but useLocation() hook returns null for location.state. This is a React Router v7 compatibility issue. Recommend: Use useLoaderData or useSearchParams as alternative, or check React Router v7 migration guide for state handling changes.
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.js: Well-structured with all data-testid attributes for testing
Gallery.js: handleRemix correctly passes state via navigate() with {state: {prompt, remixFrom}}
StoryVideoStudio.js: useEffect correctly checks location.state?.prompt but React Router v7 may not expose it immediately
pipeline_routes.py: Gallery endpoints correctly apply presigned URLs via _make_presigned_url()
r2_presign.py: Handles both .r2.dev and r2.cloudflarestorage.com URL formats correctly
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/StoryVideoStudio.js (attempted fix for state reading - needs further work)

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Gallery UI/UX all working, remix state prefill broken)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 30 showcase items in pipeline_jobs collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery page is fully functional. Backend returns presigned URLs correctly. The CRITICAL bug is in the remix flow: when user clicks 'Remix' button on a gallery video, navigation happens correctly to /app/story-video-studio with state in history.state.usr.prompt, but the StoryVideoStudio component's useEffect reading location.state?.prompt returns null. This is likely a React Router v7 behavior change. The state IS in the browser history (confirmed via window.history.state.usr.prompt) but useLocation() hook doesn't expose it. Cookie consent banner must be dismissed on first visit.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Gallery remix story text not prefilled
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: React Router v7 changed how navigation state is handled. The state is stored in history.state.usr but useLocation().state returns null/undefined. This may be due to: (1) Race condition where component mounts before state is hydrated, (2) React Router v7 API changes in state handling, (3) Webpack/bundler not properly polyfilling history state
reproduction_steps: 2. Click 'Remix This Video' on any gallery card
4. Story Text textarea is EMPTY instead of being prefilled with video's story_text
attempted_fixes: Added location.state as dependency to useEffect - no change
Added fallback to window.history?.state?.usr - no change (value exists but component still shows empty)
Added console.log debug - log never appears meaning condition is not met
rca_of_the_issue.recommended_fix: Main agent should investigate React Router v7 state handling. Options: (1) Use useSearchParams and pass prompt via URL query params instead, (2) Use localStorage to pass remix data, (3) Check React Router v7 docs for proper state access pattern
